_**User**_

Explore the codebase at /Users/brendanoneill/data-maps thoroughly. I need to understand:

1. The full project structure (all source files)
2. How the dashboard page is laid out - what controls/toggles exist (Show Dependencies, Fides Data Groups vs Data Categories, Filter vs Query, Board vs List)
3. Where these controls are currently rendered in the UI
4. The state management approach (useDashboardState hook)
5. Any existing UI patterns for modals, slideouts, or panels
6. The styling approach (CSS modules, Tailwind, styled-components, etc.)
7. The component hierarchy from App.tsx down

Read all relevant source files to get a complete picture. Be very thorough - read every component file, the hook, the App.tsx, any CSS/style files, and the sample data structure.

Here is a concise report based on the files under `/Users/brendanoneill/data-maps`.

---

## 1. Project structure (source and config)

**Root**

| Path | Role |
|------|------|
| `/Users/brendanoneill/data-maps/package.json` | Vite + React 18, Tailwind 4, Headless UI, nuqs, lucide-react |
| `/Users/brendanoneill/data-maps/vite.config.ts` | React plugin, `@tailwindcss/vite`, `@` → `./src` |
| `/Users/brendanoneill/data-maps/tsconfig.json`, `tsconfig.node.json` | TypeScript |
| `/Users/brendanoneill/data-maps/sample_data.json` | Array of `System`-shaped records (imported in app) |

**`src/`**

- **Entry:** `main.tsx`, `App.tsx`, `index.css`, `vite-env.d.ts`
- **Types:** `types/index.ts`
- **Context:** `context/AlertContext.tsx`, `context/SlideoutContext.tsx`
- **Hooks:** `hooks/useDashboardState.ts`, `hooks/useFilteredSystems.ts`, `hooks/useDependencyHighlight.ts`, `hooks/useCardRegistry.ts`
- **Helpers:** `helpers/categoryClassification.ts`, `helpers/colors.ts`, `helpers/constants.ts`, `helpers/formatLabel.ts`, `helpers/groupSystems.ts`, `helpers/systemLookup.ts`
- **Layout:** `components/layout/AppLayout.tsx`, `Header.tsx`, `AlertContainer.tsx`, `SlideoutPanel.tsx`
- **Dashboard:** `DashboardPage.tsx`, `FilterBar.tsx`, `SentenceFilter.tsx`, `SwimlaneBoard.tsx`, `Swimlane.tsx`, `GroupedListView.tsx`, `SystemCard.tsx`, `SystemRow.tsx`, `SystemDetail.tsx`, `DependencyLines.tsx`, `DependencyTree.tsx`
- **UI:** `components/ui/Button.tsx`, `Select.tsx`, `MultiSelect.tsx`, `FilterCheckbox.tsx`, `Card.tsx`, `Badge.tsx`, `EmptyState.tsx`, `Alert.tsx`

There is no separate `styles/` folder beyond `index.css`. `.specstory/` holds tooling metadata, not app source.

---

## 2. Dashboard controls and what they do

All primary controls live in **`FilterBar`** (`/Users/brendanoneill/data-maps/src/components/dashboard/FilterBar.tsx`).

| Control | Behavior |
|--------|-----------|
| **Group by** | `Select`: `none` \| `systemType` \| `dataUse` \| `dataCategories`. Changing it clears URL filters and turns off Fides mode in state (see hook). |
| **Fides Data Group** | Pill toggle (`fidesMode`). Shown only when **data categories are “active”**: `groupBy === "dataCategories"` **or** `dimensionFilters.dataCategories.length > 0`. On = group/filter by Fides **group** names (via `classifyCategory`); Off = raw **data category** strings. Label in UI is **“Fides Data Group”** (with Layers vs List icons). |
| **Show Dependencies** | Toggles `showLines`. Shown only when **`viewMode === "board"`**. Controls whether dependency SVG lines and hover highlighting run on the board (`SwimlaneBoard` gates `DependencyLines` and highlight hooks when off). |
| **Filters vs Query** | `filterMode`: **`checkbox`** (labeled **“Filters”**) vs **`sentence`** (labeled **“Query”**). Checkbox mode: per-dimension pill checkboxes (`CheckboxFilters`). Sentence mode: `SentenceFilter` (“Show me all … that collect … for …”) with inline `MultiSelect`s. |
| **Board vs List** | `viewMode`: **`board`** (`SwimlaneBoard` + optional lines) vs **`list`** (`GroupedListView`). |

Secondary UI in the filter area: **Clear** / **Clear all filters** when any dimension filters are set; in checkbox mode, Fides group rows can show secondary category labels and a “Learn more” link.

---

## 3. Where controls are rendered

- **Entire chrome** for the dashboard: `DashboardPage` renders `FilterBar` at the top, then either `SwimlaneBoard` or `GroupedListView`, then `SlideoutPanel` (`/Users/brendanoneill/data-maps/src/components/dashboard/DashboardPage.tsx`).
- **Group by, Fides, Show Dependencies, Filters/Query, Board/List** are all in **`FilterBar`**, top row (lines ~81–201) and second row for filters (~204–231).
- **Fides “Grouped by Fides Data Group”** banner appears **below** the filter bar inside **`SwimlaneBoard`** and **`GroupedListView`** when `groupBy === "dataCategories" && fidesMode` (not inside `FilterBar`).

---

## 4. State management: `useDashboardState`

File: `/Users/brendanoneill/data-maps/src/hooks/useDashboardState.ts`.

- **URL (nuqs `useQueryStates`)** — shareable:
  - `groupBy` (string; validated against `VALID_GROUP_BY`, else falls back to `"systemType"`)
  - `st`, `du`, `dc` — comma-separated arrays for system type, data use, and data categories filters
- **`localStorage`** (keys `data-maps:*`):
  - `showLines` (default `true`)
  - `fidesMode` (default `false`); turning it on **clears `dc`** in the URL
  - `viewMode` (`board` \| `list`, default `board`)
  - `filterMode` (`checkbox` \| `sentence`, default `checkbox`)
- **`setGroupBy`**: sets `groupBy` and clears `st`/`du`/`dc`, resets `fidesMode` to false in React state and storage.
- **`toggleFilter`**: toggles one value in the right URL array for the dimension.
- **`clearFilters`**: clears `st`, `du`, `dc`.

`useFilteredSystems` derives **`groups`** and **`availableValues`** from systems + `groupBy` + `dimensionFilters` + `fidesMode` (`/Users/brendanoneill/data-maps/src/hooks/useFilteredSystems.ts`).

---

## 5. Modals, slideouts, panels

- **Slideout (main overlay):** `SlideoutPanel` uses **Headless UI** `Dialog`, `DialogPanel`, `DialogTitle`, `Transition` — full-screen backdrop, panel slides from the **right** (`/Users/brendanoneill/data-maps/src/components/layout/SlideoutPanel.tsx`).
- **State:** `SlideoutProvider` holds `isOpen`, `activeSystem`, `openSlideout` / `closeSlideout` (`/Users/brendanoneill/data-maps/src/context/SlideoutContext.tsx`). `DashboardPage` wires the panel; `SystemCard` / `SystemRow` call `openSlideout(system)`.
- **No separate centered “modal” component** — the only `Dialog` usage is this slideout pattern.
- **Toasts:** `AlertProvider` + `AlertContainer` — fixed **top-right** stack (`/Users/brendanoneill/data-maps/src/components/layout/AlertContainer.tsx`), not modal.
- **Dropdowns:** `Select` and `MultiSelect` use Headless UI **Listbox** (floating options, not slideouts).

---

## 6. Styling approach

- **Tailwind CSS v4** via `@import "tailwindcss"` in `/Users/brendanoneill/data-maps/src/index.css`, with `@theme` for custom `--font-sans`, `--color-gray-925`, `--color-gray-950`, and base `body` + scrollbar styles.
- **Vite plugin:** `@tailwindcss/vite` in `vite.config.ts`.
- **No CSS Modules**, **no styled-components** — components use **`className` strings** (Tailwind utility classes) throughout.
- **Icons:** `lucide-react` (user rule about SVGs-as-files is not followed here; icons are imported from the package).

---

## 7. Component hierarchy from `App.tsx` down

```
main.tsx
  NuqsAdapter (nuqs)
    AlertProvider
      SlideoutProvider
        App
          AppLayout
            Header
            main {children}
              DashboardPage
                FilterBar
                SwimlaneBoard | GroupedListView
                  Swimlane → SystemCard (board)
                  SystemRow (list)
                  DependencyLines (board, if showLines)
                SlideoutPanel
                  SystemDetail (if activeSystem)
                    DependencyTree (RadialGraph) …
            AlertContainer → Alert (toasts)
```

**Data:** `getAllSystems()` from `systemLookup` reads `sample_data.json` (`/Users/brendanoneill/data-maps/src/helpers/systemLookup.ts`).

**Sample data shape** (from `types/index.ts` + `sample_data.json`): each system has `description`, `fides_key`, `name`, `system_type`, `system_dependencies` (string keys), and `privacy_declarations[]` with `data_categories`, `data_subjects`, `data_use`, `name`.

If you want this turned into a diagram of URL params vs localStorage keys for documentation, say the word; in Ask mode I can only describe it, not add files.
